text:
Created attachment 228352
Rundeck 3.4.4 Update diff

This is an update to Rundeck 3.4.4.
Release notes for 3.4.4: https://docs.rundeck.com/docs/history/3_4_x/version-3.4.4.html
Also:
  - MASTER_SITES change, as bintray is shut down
  - Added DISTFILES variable as the file name to be downloaded changed to "download"
